title: Parents Night Speech
text:
## Parents Night Speech

Good evening, {adjective} parents and guardians.

I am {person}, your child's {adjective} teacher.

This year we will {verb} hard, {verb ending in -ing} often, and learn about {plural noun} in a {adjective} way.

Homework goes home every {day of week} unless a {animal} eats it.

Please label all {plural noun} with {color} tape and a {emotion} attitude.

Volunteers are needed to {verb} at the {place} field trip.

Together we can turn every student into a {adjective} {job}.

Thank you, and please do not {verb} in the parking lot.
